photo_fields.upload_hint: {{count}} photos tak, sirf images, server compression se pehle {{size}} MB.

validation.only_photo: Only photo files can be uploaded.
validation.max_size: Photo configured limit se bada hai.
validation.max_count: No more than {{count}} photos can be attached to one photo field.
validation.max_url_count: No more than {{count}} photo links can be attached to one field.
validation.absolute_url: Enter an absolute http(s) photo URL.
validation.unsupported_type: Ye photo type allowed nahi hai.

photo_max_files_per_field.label: Har field me max photos
photo_max_files_per_field.tooltip: Ek photo field me upload photos ya photo links ki maximum sankhya.

photo_max_upload_size_mb.label: Original photo ka max size
photo_max_upload_size_mb.tooltip: Server-side streaming compression se pehle maximum upload size.

photo_allowed_content_types.label: Allowed photo MIME types
photo_allowed_content_types.tooltip: Compression se pehle frontend aur backend dwara accepted image MIME types.

photo_orphan_cleanup_enabled.label: Orphan photos clean karein
photo_orphan_cleanup_enabled.tooltip: Vendor, filament ya spool se linked na hone wale photos delete karein.

photo_orphan_cleanup_time.label: Cleanup time
photo_orphan_cleanup_time.tooltip: Orphan photo cleanup ke liye daily server-local time.

photo_orphan_cleanup_ttl_hours.label: Cleanup se pehle age
photo_orphan_cleanup_ttl_hours.tooltip: Unlinked photo delete hone se pehle minimum age.
